judge.reason: The function's primary purpose is to handle TX completion: DMA unmapping, updating statistics, processing TX status, and reporting to mac80211. It contains extensive business logic unrelated to refcount management. The only refcount operations are incidental calls to free skb memory (put operations), which are minor parts of cleanup.
